channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
item.description: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

item.title: Quand Volkswagen se met au vélo électrique : cockpit avec caméra de recul, casques et lunettes connectés au menu
item.description: Malgré une activité automobile en berne, le groupe Volkswagen mise sur la mobilité douce via deux nouveaux vélos électriques Crossover et Sport eBike, conçus avec n+.

item.title: Nintendo Switch : un guide officiel vous montre les 13 étapes pour remplacer la batterie des nouveaux Joy-Con
item.description: Nintendo a publié sa documentation officielle pour vous montrer comment remplacer la batterie des nouveaux Joy-Con européens de la première Nintendo Switch.

item.title: Fin de OnePlus en Europe : restructuration, suivi clientèle… tout ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: La marque OnePlus en Europe connaît de nouvelles turbulences avec un futur incertain. Les informations que nous avons reçues évoquent une restructuration et une disparition du marché européen. Voici notre récapitulatif complet de la situation du constructeur chinois.

item.title: A hacker accessed Suno source code that reportedly details how the company scraped millions of songs
item.description: Suno says it was breached in November and "no sensitive personal information was compromised."

item.title: HP's Smart Tank 5101 all-in-one cartridge-free printer includes up to two years of free ink and it's nearly 30% off right now
item.description: The HP Smart Tank 5101 all-in-one printer prints, scans, and copies while keeping ink costs low with its refillable tank system.

item.title: Squarespace's new limited-release tools aim to help sellers tap into FOMO
item.description: Going...going...gone

item.title: New phishing campaign hits LastPass, Bitwarden users - password manager customers warned not to fall for this scam
item.description: No, LastPass' security policies have not been updated, and neither have Bitwarden's - it's a scam.

item.title: OnePlus disparaitrait dès cette semaine, Realme se restructure : Oppo est en crise
item.description: La crise au sein du groupe Oppo est plus grande qu'on ne l'imaginait. Bloomberg dévoile que OnePlus pourrait disparaitre d'Europe dès cette semaine, et Realme préparerait son retrait de Chine.

item.title: Meta aurait licencié des salariés à l’aide d’une IA : voici pourquoi ce serait inimaginable en France
item.description: Notés par des algorithmes, surveillés jusqu'au clavier, puis licenciés : 26 salariés de Meta racontent une charrette pilotée par l'IA. Une méthode qui, en Europe, aurait déjà un prix : jusqu'à 4 % du chiffre d'affaires.

item.title: Privado VPN unveils an MCP server on Windows and macOS to let your AI agent manage your connection
item.description: PrivadoVPN has built a local Model Context Protocol server into its Windows and macOS apps, letting AI dev tools connect, switch servers, and run diagnostics on your behalf.

item.title: I've been hunting for the perfect festival blackout tent — here are 9 easy-pitch options I'd happily stumble back to
item.description: Blackout fabric won't just block the 5am light — it'll also stop your tent from turning into an oven.

item.title: Meilleur TV 75 pouces 4K en 2026 : notre sélection OLED et Mini-LED
item.description: Marre de votre petit téléviseur ? Craquez donc pour une grande TV de 75 ou de 77 pouces. Que ce soit pour un film, un match de foot ou pour jouer, l'immersion ne sera que meilleure !

item.title: La fin des soldes approche : c’est le moment ou jamais de changer de smartphone sans se ruiner
item.description: Alors que les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin, les offres sur les smartphones restent particulièrement agressives. C’est l’ultime occasion de la saison pour changer de téléphone au meilleur prix : que vous visiez un fleuron haut de gamme ou un modèle plus abordable, les réductions de dernière minute valent encore le coup d'œil avant la fin.

item.title: WD Red Plus 8TB deal: Our pick for 'the best value' NAS drive is nearly $100 off
item.description: Save nearly $100 off the price of the 8TB WD Red Plus NAS drive for reliable always-on network storage.

item.title: How to watch England vs Argentina: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Lionel Messi meets Three Lions in FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final
item.description: Here's how to watch England vs Argentina for free online and from anywhere at FIFA World Cup 2026, as the Three Lions face the holders in the semi-final.

item.title: Sonos boosts its upgrade program with savings of up to 30% on speakers, soundbars, and more
item.description: Sonos has brought back its double discount upgrade program, offering 30% off speakers, soundbars, subwoofers, and more for existing owners.

item.title: Work and study laptop deals: I found the HP OmniBook 3, Asus Vivobook 14, and Dell 15 under $600 right now
item.description: These three Windows 11 laptops from Dell, HP and Asus are great picks for office workers and students headed back to school, and all for under $600.

item.title: L’avenir de Micromania en France se dessine : repreneur et stratégie
item.description: Un an après l'annonce de sa mise en vente par GameStop, Micromania tiendrait enfin son repreneur : Stephan Tétrault, le patron canadien d'EB Games. De quoi accélérer le virage de l'enseigne vers le jouet et la pop-culture.

item.title: Stripe and Advent reportedly offered to buy PayPal for around $53.4B
item.description: Stripe and private equity firm Advent International have reportedly submitted a joint bid to acquire PayPal in a deal valued at approximately $53.4 billion. Reuters reports that the offer was submitted earlier this month and is backed by roughly $50 billion in committed bank financing. Under the proposal, Stripe and Advent would jointly own PayPal, […]...

item.title: Gunnar marks Tomb Raider 30th anniversary with Lara Croft-inspired blue light glasses
item.description: Gunnar is celebrating the 30th anniversary of 'Tomb Raider' with a pair of Lara Croft-inspired blue light glasses.

item.title: Daylight saving time is a step closer to becoming permanent in the US
item.description: The US is getting closer to observing daylight saving time year-round. On Tuesday, the House advanced the Sunshine Protection Act on a 308 to 117 vote, which would turn clocks one hour ahead permanently, as reported by CBS News. President Donald Trump wrote on Truth Social in May that the bill would save the "hundreds […]

item.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
item.description: Apple Intelligence is headed to China after regulators approved Apple’s AI services through a partnership with Alibaba. The long-rumored deal will bring Alibaba’s Qwen AI models to Apple’s operating systems, marking a major expansion of the company’s generative AI platform into one of its most important markets.

item.title: Preorder Bluetti’s newest, tinier solar generator for $200 off before its release date
item.description: Snag the Bluetti Elite 100 V2 solar generator kit on sale for 22% off before its official July 20 release date.

item.title: 'We decided not to limit VPNs': UK government U-turns on age-gating privacy tools
item.description: The UK government has confirmed it will not restrict VPN access as part of its upcoming social media bans, prioritizing digital privacy while introducing new curfews for 16- and 17-year-olds.

item.title: The Ninja Prestige Smart XL air fryer is on sale for the lowest price ever at Amazon
item.description: The Ninja Prestige Smart XL countertop oven is on sale for $199.99 at Amazon, down from the standard price of $399.99. That's a 50% discount.

item.title: JBL’s Flip 7 speaker is small, versatile, and 40 percent off
item.description: Sure, Bluetooth speakers are awesome to have for picturesque beach trips, camping weekends, and other outdoor adventures. But they’re just as good to have for some sprinkler time in the yard with the kiddo, or for blasting some tunes or a podcast while you make food. No matter the use cases you have in mind, […]

item.title: The FCC plans to rip up local TV station ownership rules
item.description: The FCC might be overstepping its bounds to open the door to broadcast TV monopolies.

item.title: Popular Steam Deck model just became harder to repair
item.description: According to iFixIt, Valve is no longer supplying certain parts for Steam Deck LCD repairs.

item.title: Starlink V5 : on vous dit tout sur la nouvelle antenne et ce qu’elle vaut face à la V4
item.description: Une antenne deux fois moins gourmande, taillée pour les ouragans, et un lancement réservé aux États-Unis : pendant que Starlink dégraisse son matériel, les abonnés français, eux, viennent de voir la facture grimper.

item.title: FIFA World Cup schedule today: Games, kickoff times, livestream info for July 15
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the FIFA World Cup on July 15 including the day's schedule, kickoff times, and livestream information.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Hundreds of GitHub repos found posing as real software to push malware
item.description: Russian hackers are trying to sneak infostealers onto people's devices to grab passwords, crypto, and more.

item.title: Je suis montée à bord de la BYD la plus chère de France : la Denza Z avec 1 604 ch et la recharge en 5 minutes
item.description: C'est la supercar électrique qui défie tout. La Denza Z, du groupe chinois BYD, arrive en France à travers trois déclinaisons surpuissantes. Un 0 à 100 km/h avalé en moins de 2 secondes, 1 604 ch, et une recharge prête en 5 minutes, les performances s'affolent sur le papier. Au Festival de vitesse de Goodwood, j'ai pu m'asseoir au volant, et j'ai tenté de décortiquer ce monstre technologique. Voici ce qui vous attend dedans. ...

item.title: 8BitDo’s FlipPad is the most pocketable way to turn your phone into a Game Boy
item.description: Both 8BitDo and GameSir announced tiny gamepads designed to turn smartphones into Game Boy-inspired handhelds at CES 2026. GameSir released its Pocket Taco months ago, but the longer wait for 8BitDo's FlipPad has been well worth it. While the Pocket Taco may be a better fit for some players and devices, the FlipPad is a […]

item.title: Denshattack! is a hybrid of all the best fast-paced platformers I've ever played, and I'm convinced it's a stand out indie game this year
item.description: It's been a while since a platformer has left me amazed, and Denshattack! easily provides one of the best experiences in the genre.

item.title: 'We have maybe 20 months' to rebuild for AI agents, Meta's infrastructure VP tells VB Transform 2026
item.description: Organizations need to transform to meet the needs of agentic AI.Meta VP of Engineering Barak Yagour opened his talk at VB Transform 2026 wearing a pair of Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses, a small sign of how far AI has already worked its way into physical life. His argument went further: enterprise infrastructure was built for humans, not for agents, and it's starting to show.Yagour, who leads its data infrastructure organization, told the audience that agentic queries hitting Meta's data systems grew 30x in a single half, an inversion that he said is breaking assumptions the company spent two decades...

item.title: Lomography just created a super affordable, idiot-proof film camera that doubles your number of photos — and it comes pre-loaded with a roll and the instructions are literally printed on the body
item.description: This is possibly the most idiot-proof camera ever made, with instructions literally printed on the body.

item.title: Spotify expands parent-managed accounts to users on its free tier
item.description: The feature was previously only available to paid subscribers.

item.title: The Odyssey IMAX 70mm screening demand is so high that IMAX CEO confirms he'd 'like to see more' theaters — but actually getting them is more complicated than it looks
item.description: Demand for IMAX 70mm screenings of The Odyssey is so high that fans are doing whatever it takes to get tickets. But could this lead to more IMAX theaters worldwide?

item.title: India bets billions on breaking China’s grip on smartphone manufacturing
item.description: New Delhi announced a $6.5 billion smartphone manufacturing program and a $13.3 billion semiconductor push to deepen India's electronics supply chain.

item.title: Hinge users can now get friends to hype them up on their profiles
item.description: You can hear about a prospective match from the people who know them best.

item.title: Need a new TV? The 2026 Hisense 50-inch E7 Mini LED TV is over $300 off.
item.description: The Hisense 50-inch E7 Mini LED 4K TV is on sale at Amazon for only $397.99. That's over 40% off and its best price ever.

item.title: À seulement 139 €, ce mini vidéoprojecteur Full HD avec pied rotatif est la pépite de la fin des soldes
item.description: Alors que les soldes touchent à leur fin, le Philips NeoPix 256 s'affiche à un tarif encore plus intéressant. Ce vidéoprojecteur portable Full HD, idéal pour s'offrir des soirées cinéma à la maison sans se ruiner, voit son prix chuter à seulement 139 euros chez Boulanger au lieu de 169 euros.

item.title: Its never been cheaper to buy the 27-inch LG Ultragear OLED gaming monitor
item.description: The 27-inch OLED LG Ultragear gaming monitor is on sale for $499.99 at Amazon, down from the standard price of $899.99. That's a 44% discount.

item.title: UK plans social media curfew for teens aged 16 and 17
item.description: The UK government announced a curfew for some teens, while saying it won't move forward with a VPN ban.
